title: June 15
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}
'''June 15''' is the 166th day of the year (167th in leap years), with 199 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1941|1941]] – [[Neal Adams]] is born.
*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[Brent Anderson]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Tim Beckmann]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Neil Patrick Harris]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Anthony Atamanuik]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Leanne Best]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 63|''Star Wars'' (1977) 63]] released.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 104|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 104]] published.
*[[1993]] – ''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[From Star Wars to Star Wars: The Story of Industrial Light & Magic]]'' airs on [[Wikipedia:Fox Broadcasting Company|FOX]].
*[[2005]] – [[General Grievous 3|''General Grievous'' 3]] published.
*2005 – [[Republic 76|''Republic'' 76]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Stan Winston]] dies.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Forces of Darkness]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[Plug it in and Play: Motion Flight Game: Star Wars: Republic Squadron]]'' released.
*[[2010]] – [[Star Wars Insider 118|''Star Wars Insider'' 118]] published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Under a Black Sun]]'' published on Free RPG Day under the title '''''Shadows of a Black Sun'''''.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 20|''Star Wars'' (2015) 20]] published.
*2016 – [[Han Solo 1|''Han Solo'' 1]] published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: Join the Rebellion!]]'' to be published.
*2021 – ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] paperback edition published.
*2021 – ''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' ''Star Wars'' Legends paperback edition published.
*2021 – [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] ''Star Wars'' Legends paperback edition published.
*2021 – ''[[The Skywalker Collection: Episodes I–IX]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – [[Bounty Hunters 24|''Bounty Hunters'' 24]] published.
*2022 – [[Part V]] episode of [[Star Wars: Obi-Wan Kenobi|''Obi-Wan Kenobi'']] released.
<noinclude>
